ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Front Rise, Waist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_ranges" (
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size range */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum measurement value for the size */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum measurement value for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., Trousers, Jackets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style (e.g., formal, casual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name associated with the product */,
  "launch_year" INTEGER /* Year the product was launched */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_measurements" (
  "style_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style-measurement association */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_measurements_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manager, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_checks" (
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the quality checker */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality check associated with the report */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Measurement associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_quality_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_check_id") REFERENCES quality_checks ("quality_check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style being changed */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being changed */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old measurement value */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New measurement value */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_history_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_history_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
